Drape Notes.new_value:
Gray distressed denim shorts
Sits at the natural waist with a relaxed, slightly loose fit through the seat and thighs. The hem falls just above the knee with a raw, frayed cut. Fabric is stiff denim with minimal drape — holds its shape rather than falling. The distressing adds visual texture and bulk to the front panels. Waistband appears flat and structured.

Beige chino shorts
Clean, mid-rise fit with a structured waistband. Fabric has a linen-like texture that drapes softly but retains some body. Sits slightly loose through the seat and thighs with a hem falling just above the knee. Minimal creasing at the rise suggests a good seat fit. Overall silhouette is relaxed without being baggy.

mid-rise, relaxed through the thigh, hem just above the knee. Slightly more volume through the seat and thigh compared to Image 2. The rolled hem adds a deliberate cuff detail. Fabric has a soft cotton drape with moderate structure. Sits slightly fuller in the thigh, suggesting these may run a touch larger.

Double-forward pleats at the waist create significant volume through the hip and thigh before tapering slightly toward the ankle. Fabric is a smooth suiting-weight material with excellent drape — falls cleanly and fluidly from the waist. Breaks lightly at the shoe with a full-length hem. The black belt anchors the high waist well. The silhouette reads structured and intentional — classic Italian/European trouser territory.

Short-sleeve crochet/chunky knit with a crew neck and a white tee underneath. The knit fabric has an open, airy weave that gives it a relaxed, slightly boxy drape — it doesn't cling but follows the torso loosely. Sleeves are slightly puffed at the shoulder and taper to the elbow, adding a subtle structured detail. Hem sits at the natural waist. The layering over the white tee peeks at the collar and hem, adding depth.

Classic boxy, drop-shoulder cut with significant width through the chest and torso. Fabric is a washed cotton that drapes softly and loosely — no tension anywhere. The hem falls past the natural waist and sits freely over the trouser waistband, creating a blouson effect. Drop shoulders push the sleeve seam well down the upper arm, amplifying the relaxed, streetwear silhouette. The acid-wash gives the fabric a lived-in, uneven texture rather than a flat solid.

Long-sleeve button-down with a soft collar, worn with sleeves rolled to mid-forearm. Linen fabric drapes naturally with characteristic relaxed creasing — no stiffness, falls away from the body without clinging. The shirt is left untucked, hem sitting at mid-hip. Fit is slightly loose through the chest and shoulders — not oversized, but not tailored either. The roll on the sleeves adds a casual, effortless detail and breaks up the solid fabric well.
